title: ExGra-Med: Extended Context Graph Alignment for Medical Vision-Language Models

method.learning_scheme: Efficient end-to-end learning scheme based on advanced black-box gradient-estimation techniques
key_features: Permits fast forward and backward steps through the LLM model
Learns cross-modal associations, linking visual elements with various textual interpretations

performance_metrics.result: Exceeds LLAVA-Med (both trained on 10% of data) by 20.13%

advantages: Significantly outperforms LLAVA-Med when trained on only 10% of the data
Surpasses other SOTA pre-training methods and med-MLLM such as BiomedGPT on visual chatbot
Surpasses other SOTA pre-training methods and med-MLLM such as RadFM on zero-shot image classification with VQA

introduction.field: Multi-Modal Large Language Models (MLLM) in the medical domain
introduction.key_finding: Autoregressive learning is highly data-hungry during pre-training
